title: Vacancy for Real Estate Agent at K Raheja Corp South Asia Partners
company: K Raheja Corp South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Real Estate Agent at K Raheja Corp South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
We at K Raheja Corp South Asia Partners are looking for an experienced Real Estate Agent based out of Howrah. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About K Raheja Corp South Asia Partners:
K Raheja Corp South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Property Valuation

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with K Raheja Corp South Asia Partners!
